description.content: Address balances, transactions, and token holdings
All Etherscan API V2 calls are issued against the same endpoint, with the `module`, `action`, and `chainid` query parameters selecting the operation and target chain.

query.description: (Required) Numeric chain ID (e.g. 1 for Ethereum mainnet, 56 for BNB Smart Chain, 8453 for Base).
(Required) API module (account, contract, transaction, block, stats, gastracker, token).
(Required) Action within the module (e.g. balance, txlist, tokenbalance, getabi).
Ethereum address for account or token operations.
Smart contract address for token or contract operations.
Block tag (latest, earliest, pending) or block number.

response.name: Successful response with module-specific result payload.

description.content:
Etherscan API V2 provides unified access to blockchain data across Ethereum and 60+ EVM-compatible chains, including transactions, addresses, blocks, smart contracts, token transfers, and gas tracking. A single API key works across all supported networks.

Contact Support:
 Name: Etherscan Support
